name: Hennessy Capital Investment Corp. VIII
business: HCIC is a newly organized special purpose acquisition company incorporated in the Cayman Islands for the purpose of effecting a merger or similar business combination with one or more businesses. HCIC intends to focus on industries that complement its management team's background, particularly in industrial innovation and energy transition sectors. As of the filing, HCIC has not yet completed an initial business combination and has no operational revenues.

exposures.sentence: HCIC intends to focus on industries that complement its management team s background, and to capitalize on the ability of its management team to identify and acquire a business, focusing on the industrial innovation and energy transition sectors.

HCIC intends to focus on industries that complement its management team s background, and to capitalize on the ability of its management team to identify and acquire a business, focusing on the industrial innovation and energy transition sectors.
HCIC has engaged Teneo, a strategic advisory firm, to advise regarding target company selection in the nuclear technology, energy infrastructure and advanced industrial sectors.

HCIC s investment strategy is directed at industrial innovation and energy transition targets of $500 million or greater in expected aggregate enterprise value.
